page_tags.label: AVIATION
page_tags.source_quote: This document is a final operational checklist for pilots before takeoff.

page_tags.label: SAFETY
page_tags.source_quote: Failure to complete this checklist could lead to aircraft malfunction, communication failure, or unsafe takeoff.

page_tags.label: PROCEDURE
page_tags.source_quote: The checklist must be completed in order.

sec_01_pilot-pre-flight-checklist-intro.label: chi_G
sec_01_pilot-pre-flight-checklist-intro.source_quote: This document is a final operational checklist for pilots before takeoff.

sec_01_pilot-pre-flight-checklist-intro.label: chi_K
sec_01_pilot-pre-flight-checklist-intro.source_quote: ensure that the aircraft, crew, instruments, fuel, communication systems, and safety controls are ready before flight.

sec_02_checklist.label: chi_T
sec_02_checklist.source_quote: The checklist must be completed in order.

sec_02_checklist.label: chi_M
sec_02_checklist.source_quote: Confirm aircraft identity and flight number. Verify fuel level. Inspect engine status.

sec_02_checklist.label: chi_R
sec_02_checklist.source_quote: aircraft identity, fuel, engine, navigation instruments, radio, weather, runway, crew, emergency procedures, takeoff authorization.

sec_03_kill-condition.label: kill-condition
sec_03_kill-condition.source_quote: This checklist fails if pilots cannot determine whether a required safety item passed or failed.

sec_03_kill-condition.label: chi_G
sec_03_kill-condition.source_quote: checklist fails if pilots cannot determine whether a required safety item passed or failed.

sec_04_risk.label: chi_G
sec_04_risk.source_quote: Failure to complete this checklist could lead to aircraft malfunction, communication failure, or unsafe takeoff.
